name: File Lock Management
description: Coordinates exclusive file access between concurrently running tasks to prevent conflicts. Queues tasks that conflict on locked files and unblocks them when locks are released, including a Git operation guard.

patterns: Git operation in-progress flag blocks new lock acquisitions
Per-task lock sets for batch release on completion
dependencies: Called by TaskExecutionManager on every file-modify tool use
